data.title: Add WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete test cases to test-harvest-worktree.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Context
Story d2ef-92cc: harvest-worktree.sh must write WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete on all exit paths. This task modifies the existing test-harvest-worktree.sh to add test cases asserting the :complete write behavior BEFORE the implementation.

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh (add 2 new test cases)

## Implementation Steps
1. Read tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh to understand test fixture setup (temp git repo pattern).
2. Add test case: test_complete_comment_written_on_success
   - Given: valid worktree branch, artifacts dir, --ticket-id my-ticket-id arg
   - When: harvest-worktree.sh succeeds (merge completes)
   - Then: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment was called with "WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete branch=<branch> outcome=merged ..."
   - Since ticket comment CLI requires real .tickets-tracker/, mock or use a temp dir with git init. Check existing fixture setup for how other tests handle this.
   - Use a test that captures stdout or checks for the command invocation pattern.
3. Add test case: test_complete_comment_written_on_failure
   - Given: worktree branch with conflicting files, --ticket-id arg present
   - When: harvest-worktree.sh exits non-zero (gate failure or conflict)
   - Then: WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete written with outcome=discarded
4. Both tests must FAIL (RED) before Task 3 adds the --ticket-id logic.
5. Run bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh to confirm new tests fail.
6. Update .test-index if needed (harvest-worktree.sh is already mapped if fuzzy match works — verify).

## Given / When / Then
Given: harvest-worktree.sh is invoked with --ticket-id dso-test-id and a valid worktree branch
When: the merge succeeds
Then: WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete comment is written to the ticket with outcome=merged

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh contains test_complete_comment_written_on_success
  Verify: grep -q "test_complete_comment_written_on_success" tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh contains test_complete_comment_written_on_failure
  Verify: grep -q "test_complete_comment_written_on_failure" tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh
- [ ] New test cases fail RED (before Task 3 implementation)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (pre-existing failures excluded)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
